what_failed: Channel C0AGMF65DQB was not in openclaw.json allowlist
Empty channels config with groupPolicy=allowlist = blocked from all channels
what_worked: Eventually replied after config fix and restart
task: Respond to Admin roll call in Slack thread
lesson: If you can't post to a Slack channel, check openclaw.json channels allowlist. Also: when Admin sends webhook, read your updated files and respond.
